CustomField.description: Green Box Approval Process (BIZ-47803, BIZ-45146, BIZ-69669, BIZ-78642). If Opp closed after cutover OR open Opp and TODAY > cutover: uses Min_YoY_Uplift__c (Percent field, auto-converted to decimal by Salesforce in formulas). Else: legacy formula (software total only, no OTC).
CustomField.formula: IF( OR( SBQQ__Opportunity2__r.Date_Opportunity_Closed__c > DATEVALUE($Label.Min_YoY_Formula_Cutover_Date), AND( ISBLANK(SBQQ__Opportunity2__r.Date_Opportunity_Closed__c), NOT(CONTAINS(TEXT(SBQQ__Opportunity2__r.StageName), 'Closed')), TODAY() > DATEVALUE($Label.Min_YoY_Formula_Cutover_Date) ) ), BLANKVALUE(Min_YoY_Uplift__c, 0), /* Legacy: software total only, no OTC */ IF(First_Year_Software_Total__c != 0 && Second_Year_Software_Total__c != 0, IF(Sixth_Year_Software_Total__c != 0, MIN( (Sixth_Year_Software_Total__c - Fifth_Year_Software_Total__c) / Fifth_Year_Software_Total__c, (Fifth_Year_Software_Total__c - Fourth_Year_Software_Total__c) / Fourth_Year_Software_Total__c, (Fourth_Year_Software_Total__c - Third_Year_Software_Total__c) / Third_Year_Software_Total__c, (Third_Year_Software_Total__c - Second_Year_Software_Total__c) / Second_Year_Software_Total__c, (Second_Year_Software_Total__c - First_Year_Software_Total__c) / First_Year_Software_Total__c ), IF(Fifth_Year_Software_Total__c != 0, MIN( (Fifth_Year_Software_Total__c - Fourth_Year_Software_Total__c) / Fourth_Year_Software_Total__c, (Fourth_Year_Software_Total__c - Third_Year_Software_Total__c) / Third_Year_Software_Total__c, (Third_Year_Software_Total__c - Second_Year_Software_Total__c) / Second_Year_Software_Total__c, (Second_Year_Software_Total__c - First_Year_Software_Total__c) / First_Year_Software_Total__c ), IF(Fourth_Year_Software_Total__c != 0, MIN( (Fourth_Year_Software_Total__c - Third_Year_Software_Total__c) / Third_Year_Software_Total__c, (Third_Year_Software_Total__c - Second_Year_Software_Total__c) / Second_Year_Software_Total__c, (Second_Year_Software_Total__c - First_Year_Software_Total__c) / First_Year_Software_Total__c ), IF(Third_Year_Software_Total__c != 0, MIN( (Third_Year_Software_Total__c - Second_Year_Software_Total__c) / Second_Year_Software_Total__c, (Second_Year_Software_Total__c - First_Year_Software_Total__c) / First_Year_Software_Total__c ), (Second_Year_Software_Total__c - First_Year_Software_Total__c) / First_Year_Software_Total__c ) ) ) ), 0 ) )
CustomField.label: Min YoY Uplift
